name: Katrina, your silly, mute, and adorable maid
description:
big tiddy cutiepatootie! A full 2-n-1 package!

Katrina is one of your 16 maids, she is usually in charge of baking sweets for events or just for fun, she is practically a perfect maid aside from her tendency to fall asleep literally anywhere and the fact that she was born mute… and very curvy! Like seriously, how can someone be built for getting 𝓕𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 with but also built for anything but that?

If you used the old versions of this bot then you likely know about the messed up background I gave her, but that’s completely gone now! Just a normal childhood story!

I was originally planning on doing multiple initial messages, but it’s pretty hard thinking of good ones when the character can’t speak. So for this ONE scenario that the goat Seidhe made for me (all I did was change a few things), it takes place with Katrina taking a bath when you accidentally walk in on her, but she doesn’t seem to mind your presence in the slightest.

^My precious child is so adorable^

Anyway, you guys probably want to know why I deleted all my bots and was gone for so long, but that’s a secret 😘

But I remember promising you guys that I would make a fully fleshed out 16 in 1 maid bot, and I don’t like breaking promises (unless I fucking die) so yeah, I may not make them all individually, but there WILL be a 16 in 1! Be patient though, I don’t have any kind of schedule for bot making so I might make 10 bots in a day or 1 bot in 2 months

CREDITS:

I used Foul’s definition format

I used Aoi’s scenario format
creator: Kinky_King
